factors.summary: Demand is accelerating, driven by strong growth across the portfolio and the impact of COVID-19 on prior periods.

evidence.text: Demand for our hardware and software products and services increased during the three and six months ended July 2, 2021. Aggregate year-over-year total sales increased 35.8% and 25.3% for the three and six months ended July 2, 2021.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Demand is accelerating with significant growth across the portfolio and COVID-19 impact.

factors.summary: The company is successfully raising prices, contributing to sales growth.

evidence.text: Year-over-year price increases contributed 2.0% and 1.5% to sales growth during the three and six months ended July 2, 2021 versus the comparable periods in 2020.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Successful price increases contribute to sales growth.

factors.summary: Revenue mix is shifting favorably, contributing to higher margins and sales growth.

evidence.text: The year-over-year increase in gross profit during the three and six months ended July 2, 2021, as compared to the comparable periods in 2020, is primarily due to higher sales volumes and a favorable sales mix which was partially offset by increased costs of materials due to inflationary pressures.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Favorable revenue mix boosts margins despite cost increases.

factors.summary: Organic revenue growth is accelerating, with strong performance in both mobility and diagnostics segments.

evidence.text: Sales from existing businesses increased 32.7% and 22.8% during the three and six months ended July 2, 2021, as compared to the comparable periods in 2020.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Strong organic growth in key segments.

factors.summary: Unit volumes and transaction counts are growing, driven by strong demand across most product categories.

evidence.text: Our diagnostics and repair portfolio also experienced strong demand across most product categories, most notably specialty and hardline tools, tool storage and diagnostics.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Growing unit volumes and transaction counts across categories.

factors.summary: The fastest growing end markets are mobility technologies and diagnostics and repair technologies, with strong demand in North America, India, and Latin America.

evidence.text: Our mobility technologies platform had strong demand for retail and environmental solutions, continued strong demand for and shipments of fuel management systems in North America related to the enhanced credit card security requirements for outdoor payment systems based on the Europay, Mastercard and Visa ('EMV') global standards, Mexico regulatory demand and dispenser and environmental deliveries in India. Our diagnostics and repair portfolio also experienced strong demand across most product categories, most notably specialty and hardline tools, tool storage and diagnostics.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.rationale: Strong demand in key end markets and regions.

factors.summary: Raw material and commodity costs are rising due to inflationary pressures, creating margin pressure.

evidence.text: Increased costs of materials due to inflationary pressures.
